masterMeter.note: auto = engineering/spec/content lane progress; human = sales/hiring/panel/M&A lane; total weights both. autoCeiling is the structural cap of pure auto-mode per Constitution Article IX. AUTO-MODE LANE 37/37 ENGINEERING-COMPLETE (extended past the original 33-tile cap: Sprint 4.4 v0 Run #61, Sprint 4.4.1 v1 Run #62, Sprint 4.4.2 export Run #63, Sprint 4.4.3 hash-chain Run #64): ALL Wave-2 + Wave-1 content at 100/100 (1300 questions); SAML/SCIM library (37 tests); Stack-Vault tenant-isolated with double watermark (22 tests); JD-Forge alpha library (40 tests); Observability IaC + OTel SDK init (4 tests); PITR IaC + DR runbook; Audit Log API v0 (19 tests, GET list/detail/summary, recruiter-scoped). Master meter HOLDS at 0.78 because the cred-bound apply paths and the human-bound items (Customer-Zero, Reference Panel ≥200, SME Lead hire, first 3 logos, Bosch GCC, cred-drop) all live in the human lane. Cred-bound items are annotated engineering-complete-{cred|translation}-bound, never claimed as released.

tiles.name: Audit Log API v0 (read-only externalisation)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.4 v0 (Run #61): services/readybank ships /v1/audit/* per infra/Audit-Log-API-Spec-v0.md §3 — GET /v1/audit/events with cursor pagination + filters, GET /v1/audit/events/:id, GET /v1/audit/summary. v0 tenant scope: actor_id = recruiter.id. 19 unit tests; superseded by Sprint 4.4.1 v1 tenant-scoped scan.

tiles.name: Audit Log API v1 — tenant-scoped reads + tenant_id column
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.4.1 (Run #62): migration 0010 adds tenant_id UUID to audit.events; SCOPE_CLAUSE = (tenant_id = $1 OR (tenant_id IS NULL AND actor_id = $2)) bridges new + legacy rows. recordAuditEvent helper accepts optional tenant_id; admin.ts + reference-panel.ts call sites pass it. 22 unit tests; cross-tenant isolation + legacy fallback enforced.

tiles.name: Audit Log API — bulk export endpoints (Phase 2 §7)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.4.2 (Run #63): migration 0011 + POST /v1/audit/events/export + GET /v1/audit/exports/:id + GET /v1/audit/exports/:id/download. v0 stores rendered bytes in BYTEA, caps 10K rows. 17 unit tests; cross-tenant isolation + RFC-4180 escaping verified.

tiles.name: Audit Log hash-chaining + chain verification endpoint (§10)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.4.3 (Run #64): migration 0012_audit_events_hash_columns.sql adds hash_current + hash_previous VARCHAR(64) + partial chain-walk index. New @qorium/auth/audit-hash module exports canonicalAuditEventJson (deterministic key-sorted serialization that excludes occurred_at/hash_*), computeAuditHash (SHA-256 hex), and verifyAuditChain (walks ordered chunk, returns {valid, total, breaks, unmaterialized}). recordAuditEvent now computes hash_current synchronously per event; INSERT bumps to 11 columns. hash_previous remains nullable — Sprint 4.4.3.1 ships an async materializer that walks (tenant_id, occurred_at, id) and links each row to its predecessor without serializing the audit hot path. New GET /v1/audit/verify endpoint runs verifyAuditChain over the recruiter's tenant chain (up to 10K rows) for SOC 2 tamper-evidence. SIEM streaming explicitly deferred per spec §8 'Month 9 roadmap'. AuditEventRow + AuditEventEnvelope expose hash_current + hash_previous; SELECT_COLUMNS in repository updated. 12 new tests in packages/auth/__tests__/audit-hash.test.ts (canonical-form key-order invariance, null/omitted equivalence, occurred_at/hash_* exclusion, hash determinism, chain validation incl. break detection + unmaterialized counting). Pre-existing test bug fixed in middleware.test.ts mock (extracted event_type from values[2]; was tenant_id since 4.4.1, now correctly values[3]). Workspace: 198 active tests (+38 net auth: 12 audit-hash + bug-fixed 9 middleware; +0 readybank net since 4.4.1's audit.test/audit-exports.test add hash_current/hash_previous to row constructors only). Typecheck/lint/test/build/prettier all green; gitleaks clean.

tiles.name: Webhooks Service v0 alpha (library + schema)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.5 (Run #65): migration 0013_webhooks.sql creates webhooks.{subscriptions, events, deliveries} per Webhooks-Service-v0-Spec.md §2 — 180-day signing-secret rotation slot, dispatcher index (next_retry_at, id) WHERE status='pending', subscription history index, customer-history view-friendly subscription_idx. New @qorium/webhooks package ships 4 pure-TS modules: signature.ts (HMAC-SHA256 over `{event_type}.{timestamp}.{body}` per spec §5; constant-time verifyWebhookSignature with 5-min replay tolerance; buildWebhookHeaders emits X-QOrium-{Signature,Timestamp,Delivery}), retry.ts (exact spec §6 schedule [0s, 60s, 5m, 30m, 4h, 24h] over 35-hour window; computeNextRetryAt returns null past MAX_ATTEMPTS), attempt-classifier.ts (success/retryable/dead-letter for HTTP status + transport-level errors per spec §6), event-envelope.ts (spec §4 payload shape; idempotency_key=id; 15-event catalog spanning ReadyBank/JD-Forge/Stack-Vault/Security; isValidEventType accepts catalog + open `prefix.subject` slugs ≤64 chars). 43 unit tests across 4 files: signature determinism + drift + tamper + length checks; retry schedule values + null-past-max + window math; classifier full HTTP + transport-error matrix; envelope id-prefixing + key invariants. The PM2 service + Redis-backed delivery worker land in Sprint 4.5.1 — at which point services subscribe to in-process emitters (e.g., the audit-log webhook hook) and dispatch via the queue. 43 active tests; typecheck/lint/test/build/prettier all green; gitleaks clean.

tiles.name: ATS Connector Framework v0 alpha (lib + Lever stub + schema)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 4.6 (Run #66): migration 0014_ats_connectors.sql creates ats.{connections, sync_runs}; HMAC-keyed credential_hash slot for static API tokens + OAuth refresh slot for Workday-class ATSes (Sprint 4.6.2). New @qorium/ats-connectors package per ATS-Connector-Framework-v0.md §2.3: types.ts (Candidate / Job / AssessmentResult / ConnectorAdapter / SyncCursor / SyncPage), sync-state.ts (idle→running→succeeded|failed FSM with terminal-status guard + counts arithmetic), field-mapper.ts (dotted-path source resolution + string/number/boolean/date coercion + per-tenant overrides), adapters/lever.ts (LeverAdapter implementing ConnectorAdapter; default field mapping for Lever's id/firstName/lastName/emails[0]/stage.text/categories shape; createMockLeverFetcher seeded for tests). 23 unit tests across 3 files (sync-state FSM 7, field-mapper 9, Lever adapter 7). Live HTTP fetch + Greenhouse/Workday/Ashby/Darwinbox adapters land in Sprint 4.6.1+ per spec §3 + Constitution Article IX M9 phase-gate mandate. Typecheck/lint/test/build/prettier all green; gitleaks clean.

tiles.name: Multi-region terraform skeleton (DR pair)
tiles.evidence: Sprint 5.0 (Run #67): infra/auto-bootstrap/multi-region.tf — paired ap-south-1 + ap-southeast-1 VPCs (10.10/16 + 10.20/16), cross-region VPC peering with auto-accept on the DR side, S3 cross-region replication bucket for audit-log + export buckets (Sprint 4.2 + 4.4.2), Route53 /healthz health check + composite CloudWatch alarm 'qorium-primary-region-down', RPO=15min / RTO=60min variables. Existing apply.sh wrapper already supports the new module (BOOTSTRAP_AUTHORIZED=true ./apply.sh multi-region). New governance/multi-region-runbook.md complements dr-runbook.md with the cross-region cutover decision tree (verify region failure → decide → notify → promote replica → re-point Route53 → smoke test → declare complete; ~50 min total under 60-min RTO target), failover triggers, RPO/RTO mechanism table, failback procedure, quarterly drill cadence, cred-drop checklist. Engineering-complete; apply halts on cred-drop per Constitution Article IX. The replica wiring (post primary RDS migration) lands in Sprint 5.0.1.

tiles.name: SOC 2 readiness harness — control mapping + evidence pull
tiles.evidence: Sprint 5.1 (Run #68): governance/soc2/{README, control-mapping, evidence-collection}.md ship the full TSC-to-QOrium control map covering CC1.1–CC9.2 (each row has a control description, QOrium implementation reference, and an evidence query). Quarterly evidence-pull runbook covers Q1–Q4 cadence, output JSON shape, AWS S3 archive path with Object-Lock + cross-region replication target. New services/readybank/src/scripts/soc2-evidence-pull.ts (skeleton): reads audit.events with optional --tenant filter, classifies by category (auth/leak/api_key_rotation/stack_vault/compliance/other), pulls api_keys snapshot + rotation count, lists migrations applied in window, leaves hash-chain verification to Sprint 5.1.1 (per-tenant parallel calls). 6 unit tests for classifyEventType. CTO-DELTA: Sprint 5.1.1 wires the cron + per-tenant hash-chain walk + S3 upload; v0 ships the auditable contract (control map + evidence shape + manual run). Workspace: 127 readybank tests (+6 soc2). Typecheck/lint/test all green.

tiles.name: Outcome metrics — SQL views + dashboards spec
tiles.evidence: Sprint 7.0 (Run #69): governance/metrics/{README, outcome-metrics-spec, dashboards}.md ship the canonical metric definitions (ARR/MRR/NRR · DAU/MAU/stickiness · content-throughput-30d · wave-coverage · IRT-coverage · leak-rate-quarterly · webhook-success · ats-sync-success · audit-volume · hash-chain-coverage) and Grafana panel specs (4 dashboards: Revenue, Adoption, Content Quality, Engineering Health) + alerting rules (Sprint 7.0.2). Migration 0015_outcome_metrics_views.sql creates schema metrics with 9 read-only views over canonical tables (audit.events, content.questions, content.leak_alerts, app.subscriptions, app.tenants); each view defensive against empty source tables (e.g., metrics.tenant_arr returns 0 rows when subscriptions table is empty — correct, not broken). v0 uses regular VIEWs; Sprint 7.0.0.1 promotes any slow ones to MATERIALIZED VIEW with REFRESH CONCURRENTLY 5-min cadence. Sprint 7.0.1 provisions the actual Grafana dashboards (cred-bound on Sprint 4.1 observability.tf apply); Sprint 7.0.2 wires alerting; Sprint 7.0.3 ships public investor metrics page at metrics.qorium.online. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 per Constitution Article IX: business outcomes (ARR / IPO / first 3 logos) are HUMAN-BOUND; this sprint ships the engineering surface that measures progress, not the outcomes themselves.

runs.summary: Sprint 7.0 — Outcome instrumentation (final auto-mode-run sprint #8 of 8). governance/metrics/{README, outcome-metrics-spec, dashboards}.md + migration 0015 ship the engineering surface for measuring progress against Constitution Article IX outcomes (ARR / DAU / content throughput / quality signals). 9 read-only SQL views in new metrics schema. Grafana panel specs for 4 dashboards (Revenue / Adoption / Content / Engineering) + alerting rules. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 — business outcomes themselves are human-bound. Auto lane (main view): 33/33 → 34/34. 🟢 AUTO-LANE EXTENDED COMPLETE — all 8 autonomous-run sprints (4.4.1, 4.4.2, 4.4.3, 4.5, 4.6, 5.0, 5.1, 7.0) shipped + the audit-log foundation (4.4 v0) + the CI fix that unblocks them all.

Sprint 5.1 — SOC 2 readiness harness. governance/soc2/{README, control-mapping, evidence-collection}.md ship the full TSC-to-QOrium control map (CC1.1–CC9.2) + quarterly evidence-pull runbook. New services/readybank/src/scripts/soc2-evidence-pull.ts skeleton reads audit.events + api_keys + migrations within a window and writes a single JSON evidence package; classifies events by 6 SOC2-relevant categories. 6 new unit tests for classifyEventType. Sprint 5.1.1 wires cron + per-tenant hash-chain walk + S3 upload with Object-Lock immutability. Auto lane (main view): 33/33 → 34/34. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 5.0 — Multi-region terraform skeleton (DR pair). New infra/auto-bootstrap/multi-region.tf provisions paired ap-south-1 + ap-southeast-1 VPCs with cross-region peering, S3 cross-region replication for audit/export buckets, Route53 health-check + composite alarm 'qorium-primary-region-down', RPO=15min / RTO=60min targets. New governance/multi-region-runbook.md ships the cross-region cutover decision tree (~50 min under 60-min RTO target), failback procedure, quarterly drill cadence, cred-drop checklist. Engineering-complete-cred-bound: terraform plan green; apply halts on BOOTSTRAP_AUTHORIZED=true. Replica wiring lands in Sprint 5.0.1 once primary moves to RDS. Auto lane: 33/33 → 34/34 (main view). Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 4.6 — ATS Connector Framework v0 alpha (library + schema). Migration 0014 creates ats.{connections, sync_runs} per ATS-Connector-Framework-v0.md §2. New @qorium/ats-connectors package: universal Candidate/Job/AssessmentResult abstraction, ConnectorAdapter interface, SyncStateMachine (idle→running→succeeded|failed FSM), generic field-mapper (dotted-path source + type coercion + per-tenant overrides), LeverAdapter stub with createMockLeverFetcher. 23 unit tests. Live HTTP fetch + Greenhouse/Workday/Ashby/Darwinbox adapters land in Sprint 4.6.1+ per Constitution Article IX M9 phase-gate. Auto lane (main view): 33/33 → 34/34. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Article IX.

Sprint 4.5 — Webhooks Service v0 alpha (library + schema). Migration 0013 creates webhooks.{subscriptions, events, deliveries} per Webhooks-Service-v0-Spec.md §2. New @qorium/webhooks package ships 4 modules: signature (HMAC-SHA256 per §5), retry (spec §6 schedule [0,1m,5m,30m,4h,24h] over 35h), attempt-classifier (HTTP + transport-error matrix), event-envelope (§4 payload shape + 15-event catalog). 43 unit tests, all green. The PM2 service + Redis-backed delivery worker land in Sprint 4.5.1. Auto lane (main view): 33/33 → 34/34. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX. (Note: this PR branches directly off main; the audit-log series 4.4/4.4.1/4.4.2/4.4.3 stacked branches will reconcile run IDs 61-64 + auto-lane increments at merge time.)

Sprint 4.4.3 — Audit Log hash-chaining + GET /v1/audit/verify (§10). Migration 0012 adds hash_current + hash_previous VARCHAR(64) + partial chain-walk index. New @qorium/auth/audit-hash exports canonicalAuditEventJson/computeAuditHash/verifyAuditChain (SHA-256, deterministic canonical form). recordAuditEvent computes hash_current synchronously per event; INSERT bumps to 11 columns. hash_previous remains async-materialized (Sprint 4.4.3.1) so writes never serialize on the prior row. New GET /v1/audit/verify walks the recruiter's chain (up to 10K rows) and returns {valid, total, breaks, unmaterialized} for SOC 2 tamper-evidence. SIEM streaming explicitly deferred per spec §8 'Month 9 roadmap'. 12 new audit-hash unit tests + middleware mock pre-existing event_type position bug fix. Auto lane: 36/36 → 37/37. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 4.4.2 — Audit Log API bulk export (Phase 2 §7). Migration 0011 adds app.audit_export_jobs; POST /v1/audit/events/export creates a job (5 concurrent/tenant cap, 366-day range cap), kicks in-process worker via setImmediate, returns 202+job_id. GET /v1/audit/exports/:id returns status envelope; GET /v1/audit/exports/:id/download streams CSV/JSON bytes with Content-Disposition: attachment (409 not-ready, 410 expired, 404 cross-tenant). New jobs/audit-export-worker.ts + repositories/audit-exports.ts. v0 stores rendered bytes in BYTEA, caps at 10K rows; Sprint 4.4.2.1 promotes to S3 + true async worker. 17 new unit tests (audit-exports.test.ts) cover all paths + tenant isolation + RFC-4180 CSV escaping. Auto lane: 35/35 → 36/36. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 4.4.1 — Audit Log API v1 (tenant-scoped). Migration 0010 adds tenant_id UUID to audit.events + partial index. recordAuditEvent helper accepts tenant_id (optional, non-breaking); admin.ts + reference-panel.ts call sites pass it. Repository SCOPE_CLAUSE: (tenant_id = $1 OR (tenant_id IS NULL AND actor_id = $2)) — primary tenant filter + transitional fallback for legacy v0-era rows so each recruiter still sees their own pre-migration audit trail without leaking cross-tenant or other-recruiter legacy rows. AuditEventRow + AuditEventEnvelope gain tenant_id field. Routes pass recruiter.tenantId. 22 unit tests cover cross-tenant isolation, legacy fallback (visible vs invisible cases), summary aggregation respecting both, envelope mapping with tenant_id. Auto lane: 34/34 → 35/35. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 4.4 v0 — Audit Log API extension past the auto-lane 33-tile cap. New /v1/audit/* on services/readybank per infra/Audit-Log-API-Spec-v0.md §3 Phase 1: GET list with cursor pagination + (action, resource_type, start_date, end_date) filters, GET detail by id, GET summary (default 30-day window + top_n). Field aliasing event_type→action / entity_type→resource_type / entity_id→resource_id / changes.before|after→old_values|new_values / payload→details / occurred_at→timestamp. v0 tenant scope: recruiter sees their own audit trail (actor_id = recruiter.id); org-wide scope deferred to Sprint 4.4.1 with tenant_id column on audit.events. Phase 2 export + webhook integration deferred to Sprint 4.4.2. 19 unit tests (auth gates, envelope mapping, cursor roundtrip, cross-recruiter isolation, summary aggregation). Auto lane: 33/33 → 34/34. Master meter UNCHANGED at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

🟢 AUTO-LANE 33/33 ENGINEERING-COMPLETE. Sprint 3.4: Stack-Vault tenant isolation + double watermark. Migration 0009_stack_vault.sql adds app.tenant_stack_vaults (per-tenant tier/floor/expiry/encrypted-pepper) and content.questions.stack_vault_tenant_id with sparse partial UNIQUE INDEX (stack_vault_tenant_id, qor_id) so the same qor_id is independent across tenants. New services/readybank/src/middleware/tenant-isolation.ts: requireActiveVault layered on @qorium/auth AuthContext — returns 401 unauth, 403 on SO-10 export:stack-vault scope (forbidden per Constitution + D3), 404 on no/lapsed/expired vault (no existence leak), 503 on missing pepper, attaches VaultContext on success. New services/readybank/src/stack-vault/watermark.ts: computeDoubleWatermark (HMAC-SHA256 over baseSeed||tenantId||renderId; per-vault pepper), applyVisibleFooter (idempotent), applyHomoglyphStego (Latin→Cyrillic homoglyph mask driven by signature bits). New services/readybank/src/repositories/stack-vault.ts: every SELECT/INSERT joins on tenant_id (defense in depth). New services/readybank/src/routes/stack-vault.ts: GET list / GET one (renders with double watermark) / POST create with 23505 → 409 mapping. 22 new unit tests pass: 14 watermark (determinism, cross-tenant unforgeable, pepper rotation, render-event uniqueness, footer format, homoglyph determinism) + 8 middleware (401/403/404/503/success). Workspace: 138 active tests, 0 failures, 21 DB-integration tests skipped per existing pattern.

schemaInvariants.autoEligibilityRule: A tile is auto_eligible iff its evidence-of-done is a commit on main. Sales/hiring/panel/IP/M&A tiles are NEVER auto_eligible.
stopConditions: Outbound message to humans outside bot perimeter
Production credential operation without prior cred-drop
